mapper.select:
-- 보고서 필터에서 선택 가능한 사업본부 목록을 권한 범위 기준으로 조회한다. SELECT d.code, d.name FROM departments d WHERE d.is_active = TRUE
AND d.code IN
#{departmentCode}
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY d.display_order, d.department_id

-- 영업 보고서 사업본부별 집계 데이터를 검색 조건과 권한 범위에 따라 조회한다. SELECT d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, COUNT(o.opportunity_id) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN o.status IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') THEN 0 ELSE o.project_amount END ), 0) AS total_project_amount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') AND ps.probability >= 90 THEN o.project_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS confirmed_revenue_amount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') AND ps.probability < 90 THEN o.project_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS expected_revenue_amount, COUNT( CASE WHEN o.status IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END ) AS hold_lost_count, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN o.status IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') THEN o.project_amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS hold_lost_amount FROM opportunities o INNER JOIN departments d ON d.department_id = o.department_id INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = o.probability_stage_id
GROUP BY d.code, d.name, d.display_order ORDER BY d.display_order, d.code

-- 영업 보고서 행 데이터를 검색 조건과 권한 범위에 따라 조회한다. SELECT o.opportunity_id, d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, o.customer_name, o.project_name, o.security_level, o.owner_name, o.expected_order_period, o.expected_delivery_period, o.project_amount, o.status, ps.probability, ps.name AS probability_stage_name, o.created_at FROM opportunities o INNER JOIN departments d ON d.department_id = o.department_id INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = o.probability_stage_id
ORDER BY d.display_order, o.created_at DESC, o.opportunity_id DESC
